5. 【优势学科】心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范类与农学特色鲜明，对文科类考生吸引力更强；理科组招生专业以工科、农科为主，优势学科直接覆盖有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐，与西南大学理科组开设的软件工程、电气工程及其自动化、数学类等专业方向匹配，有 利于吸引高分考生；本省2026年高考总人数约15.4万人，较2025年（约11.6万）大幅增长约32%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约11.08万人，竞争显著加剧。；西南大学位于重庆（非本省），在内蒙古招生占比约1.3%–2.5%，属跨省招生；重庆作为西南地区中心城市，对北方考生有一定地域吸引力，但非主要 报考偏好省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次10801名、2026年物理类计划大幅缩招39%（降低竞争）、本省考生总数增长约32%（加剧竞争）以及学校软科排名持续上升 等因素，缩招效应与考生增长效应部分对冲；考虑考生规模大幅增长带来的竞争压力略占主导，小幅上调后预测最低位次约8298名，区间 7798–8798名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 8072 → 16214 → 20373 → 28619 → 10801, showing significant volatility. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous backward trend (from 8072 to 28619). In 2025, due to the change in the college entrance examination model to Physics/History categories and the merger of admission batches, the ranking rebounded significantly to 10801, about 17818 places earlier than in 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 10801. The provincial science group enrollment plan was 5 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 18 in 2024, and 33 in 2025 (Physics Category). In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 20, a reduction of 13 from 2025 (a decrease of about 39%), which is a significant reduction, theoretically reducing competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative (mainly related to food delivery management disputes, mostly neutral events), with no obvious negative impact on applications. Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, and application attention is at an upper-middle level. No history of admission cut-off failures. 5. [Advantage Disciplines] Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, with distinctive features in teacher training and agriculture, attracting more liberal arts candidates. The science group enrollment majors are mainly engineering and agriculture, with limited direct coverage of advantage disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended in society, matching the software engineering, electrical engineering and automation, mathematics and other majors offered in the science group of Southwest University, which helps attract high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (about 116,000). By historical proportion, it is estimated that there are about 110,800 physics category candidates, significantly intensifying competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing (not in the province), with enrollment in Inner Mongolia accounting for about 1.3%–2.5%, which is cross-provincial enrollment. As a central city in the southwest region, Chongqing has some regional appeal to northern candidates, but it is not a major preferred province for applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 10801 in 2025, the significant reduction of 39% in the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 (reducing competition), the increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, the reduction effect and the candidate growth effect partially offset each other. Considering that the competitive pressure from the significant increase in candidate numbers slightly dominates, after a small upward adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 8298, with a range of 7798–8798.

- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Beibei Campus)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics) (Beibei Campus).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 7798–8798. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction. Tier 1 majors (Software Engineering, Electrical Engineering) can be attempted but require a ranking significantly better than the upper limit of the range. Tier 3 majors (Plant Production, Veterinary Medicine, etc.) serve as a safe backup. The engineering majors in the science group of Southwest University have high social popularity, but the advantage disciplines (Psychology A, Education A) are mainly oriented towards liberal arts. Science candidates should focus on employment-oriented majors such as Software Engineering and Electrical Engineering.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1233 → 2476 → 2367 → 5004 → 2470, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. The ranking was best in 2021 (1233rd), dropped significantly to 5004th in 2024 (affected by batch merging), and rebounded to 2470th in 2025 (History Category), advancing about 2534 places compared to 2024. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2470th; the provincial liberal arts group plan had 3 students in 2021, 2 in 2022, 4 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 7 in 2025 (History Category); the 2026 History Category plan is 6 students, a decrease of 1 student (about 14.3%) from 2025, indicating a slight reduction in enrollment.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, showing continuous improvement and enhanced comprehensive strength; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (mainly disputes over food delivery management, mostly neutral incidents), with limited impact on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; no history of application gaps; Psychology rated A, Education rated A, Marxist Theory rated A-, all related to liberal arts, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates; as one of the six normal universities directly under the Ministry of Education, the normal university label has a positive effect on liberal arts candidates' willingness to apply.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social interest in normal/education majors is divided and cautious, but liberal arts candidates show high attention to normal universities; the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% from 2025 (about 116,000), with an estimated 43,200 liberal arts candidates based on historical proportions, leading to sharply intensified competition; Southwest University is located in Chongqing (not in the province), with a very small proportion of enrollment in Inner Mongolia's liberal arts group (about 0.1%–0.3%), making it cross-provincial enrollment; Chongqing's region has average appeal to northern candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2470th, the slight reduction in the 2026 History Category plan by 14.3% (slightly reducing competition), the 32% increase in total examinees in the province (intensifying competition), the continuous rise in the university's Soft Science Ranking, and the brand effect of a normal university directly under the Ministry of Education; taking into account the competitive pressure from the significant increase in examinees and the appeal of normal universities to liberal arts candidates, the predicted minimum ranking is slightly adjusted upward to about 2288th, with a range of 1876–2700th.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking range is 1876–2700. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Public Administration, Ethnology) as the main direction; Tier 1 majors (Geographical Sciences, Business Administration) require a ranking significantly better than the lower limit of the range to be attempted; Tier 3 majors (Marketing, Rural Governance) serve as safety options. Southwest University has few liberal arts group enrollment majors, and its advantageous disciplines like Psychology A and Education A are not directly matched to enrollment majors; candidates should choose based on their own interests and subject evaluation grades.
